_comment: Firmware Lens - Static Architecture Analysis Configuration
_toolchain_info: Select one: keil | visualgdb | compile_commands | loose_cpp
_project_type_info: Optional: firmware | desktop (used to adapt pipeline behavior)
_libclang_info: Absolute path to libclang shared library (optional if LIBCLANG_PATH env variable is set)
_project_root_info: Root directory of the project (recommended for filtering and relative paths)
_source_dir_info: Used ONLY for loose_cpp mode (directory containing .c/.cpp files)
_stub_dir_info: Required ONLY for keil (ARMCC compatibility stubs)
_loose_stub_info: Optional include directory for loose_cpp mode (e.g. Qt stubs)
_armcc_stub_header_info: Stub header for ARMCC emulation (keil only)
